title: 2 Ducats - Frederik V (Danish Asiatic Co. Gold)

obverse.description: Draped and armored bust of King Frederik V facing right
obverse.lettering:
FRIDERICVS • V • D •   |  G • REX • DAN • NOR • V • G •
A
obverse.lettering_translation: Frederik V Dei Gratia King of Denmark, Norway, the Wends and the Goths
obverse.picture_copyright: London Coin Galleries with Heritage Auctions UK

reverse.description: Banner with initials of the Danish-Asian trading company "KODAC" (Kongelig Oetroyeret Dansk Asiatisk Compagnie) placed on a mast in shape of trident set upon prow of a roman galley.
reverse.lettering:
REGALIBVS AVSPICII
KODAC
________________
EX AURO SINICO
1746
reverse.picture_copyright: London Coin Galleries with Heritage Auctions UK

comments: Dukat struck with gold from China, worked in Tharangambadi (Tranquebar), from 1620-1845 Danish colony in Southeast India.

related_types.title: 1 Ducat - Frederik V (Danish Asiatic Co. Gold)
